claims.name: reproduces_original_negative
claims.detail: (additive joint at rho=2.6 = x0.757 reproduces the scscope_joint_endpoint x0.757)

claims.name: additive_saturates
claims.detail: (additive joint -> x1.130 as rho->inf (sunset-limited), NOT linear in rho: the pairing formula rho/2.872 was a local approximation, wrong when extrapolated)

claims.name: conservative_does_not_close
claims.detail: (K_floor<=T'<=n_pack=40.7 => rho_lat=6.55 => additive joint x0.945 < 1 -- the floor sharpening alone does NOT close the endpoint under the correct bookkeeping)

claims.name: verified_ratio_marginal
claims.detail: (K_floor=0.52T' (verified on tiny shells) => rho_lat=12.60 => x1.026 -- marginal (<x1.05), too thin and ratio-dependent to claim a lift)

claims.name: threshold_is_9p85_not_3p9
claims.detail: (additive bookkeeping needs rho >= 9.86 (NOT the 3.9 my note used); requires K_floor <= 27.1, i.e. T' <= 27 (or <= 52 with the 0.52 ratio))
